web_results.title: 2026 Israeli–United States strikes on Iran - Wikipedia
web_results.description: Israel and Iran ian proxies have been engaged in conflict since 1985, which escalated into two direct strikes in 2024, and in 2025 they fought a 12-day war that also saw US strikes aimed at destroying Iran's nuclear facilities. In the weeks before the 2026 attack, Iran and the US had been in indirect nuclear negotiations mediated by Oman, and a second round of nuclear talks had been scheduled to be held in Geneva.
